title: harpalyce alba
intro: Harpalyce alba, also known as the "butterfly pea", is a plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Harpalyce alba include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Harpalyce alba is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
